title: Nagaland University Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 13 Posts
short_info: Nagaland University has released the official Non-Teaching Posts Notification 2026 at nagalanduniversity.ac.in. A total of 13 vacancies have been announced under the Nagaland University Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between Max: 56 years (for Finance Officer) and Max: 28 years (for other posts) with a qualification of Master's Degree, Bachelor's Degree, Diploma, 10+2, HSLC are eligible to apply online from 14 May 2026 to 13 June 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.age_details: Max 30 years for Junior Engineer, Max 45 years for Internal Audit Officer, Max 50 years for Deputy Registrar, Max 56 years for Finance Officer, Max 28 years for others.
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 30 years for Junior Engineer. Maximum age limit is 45 years for Internal Audit Officer. Maximum age limit is 50 years for Deputy Registrar. Maximum age limit is 56 years for Finance Officer. Maximum age limit is 28 years for other posts. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India norms for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PWD categories. Upper age limit is not insisted for existing University employees.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree, Bachelor's Degree, Diploma, 10+2, HSLC
qualification.details: Finance Officer: Master's Degree with at least 55% marks or equivalent + 15 years experience as Assistant Professor (Level 11+) or 8 years (Level 12+) or comparable experience or 15 years administrative experience including 8 years as Deputy Registrar. Internal Audit Officer: All India Organised Audit and Accounts Services Officer with 3 years experience OR qualified CA/ICWA or SAS equivalent with analogous post and 8 years service OR 8 years service as Assistant Finance Officer/Account Officer with audit/accounts experience. Deputy Registrar: Master's degree with at least 55% marks + Nine years experience as Assistant Professor (Level 10+) or comparable or 5 years as Assistant Registrar. Desirable: Experience in establishment/finance/exams. Assistant Librarian: Master's degree in Library Science/Information Science/Documentation with 55% marks + NET qualified or Ph.D. + experience in library computerization. Nursing Officer: B.Sc. (Nursing) or B.Sc. (Hons) Nursing + registered with Nursing Council + 2 years experience in Govt. Hospital. Junior Engineer (Civil): Three years Diploma in Civil Engineering. Desirable: B.E. Civil + AutoCAD knowledge. Senior Technical Assistant (Agricultural Extension Education): Master's Degree in relevant subject + at least two years experience in relevant field. Senior Technical Assistant (Livestock Production & Management): Master's Degree in relevant subject + at least two years experience in relevant field. Senior Technical Assistant (Botany): Master's Degree in relevant subject + at least two years experience in relevant field. Senior Technical Assistant (Horticulture): Master's Degree in relevant subject + at least two years experience in relevant field. Fieldman: 10+2 (Science) + three years experience in relevant field. Work Assistant (Civil): HSLC + relevant ITI certificate + knowledge/experience in civil construction. Desirable: 3 years experience. Bus/Truck Conductor: HSLC. Desirable: Valid driving license for LMV/HMV/Passenger/ITI in Auto Electrician/Mechanic.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Internal Audit Officer (5 years tenure post)

salary_details.details: Finance Officer: Pay level-14 (144200-218200) Internal Audit Officer: Pay level-12 (78800-209200) Deputy Registrar: Pay level-12 (78800-209200) Assistant Librarian: Pay Academic level-10 (57700-182400) Nursing Officer: Pay level-7 (44900-142400) Junior Engineer (Civil): Pay level-6 (35400-112400) Senior Technical Assistant (Agricultural Extension Education): Pay level-6 (35400-112400) Senior Technical Assistant (Livestock Production & Management): Pay level-6 (35400-112400) Senior Technical Assistant (Botany): Pay level-6 (35400-112400) Senior Technical Assistant (Horticulture): Pay level-6 (35400-112400) Fieldman: Pay level-3 (21700-69100) Work Assistant (Civil): Pay level-2 (19900-63200) Bus/Truck Conductor: Pay level-1 (18000-56900)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Nagaland University Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Nagaland University to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Nagaland University Non-Teaching Posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Nagaland University Non-Teaching Posts is 13th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Non-Teaching Posts at Nagaland University?
faq.answer: There are a total of 13 vacancies announced for various Non-Teaching Posts at Nagaland University in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Non-Teaching Posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification varies by post, ranging from HSLC and 10+2 to Bachelor's Degree and Master's Degree, along with specific experience requirements for certain positions.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for General/OBC category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 1000/-. SC/ST candidates need to pay Rs. 500/-, and PwBD candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit varies for different posts, with a maximum of 30 years for Junior Engineer, 45 for Internal Audit Officer, 50 for Deputy Registrar, 56 for Finance Officer, and 28 years for others. Age relaxation is applicable as per norms.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for Nagaland University Non-Teaching Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Written Examination, Interview, and Screening/Shortlisting of candidates based on their performance.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates from outside Nagaland apply for these posts?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any domicile restrictions. Generally, government job notifications are open to eligible candidates across India unless otherwise stated.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary structure for the Non-Teaching Posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 18000 to Rs. 218200 per month, depending on the specific post and its corresponding pay level as per the 7th Central Pay Commission.

faq.question: Q9. How can I check the detailed eligibility criteria for each post?
faq.answer: Detailed eligibility criteria, including educational qualifications and experience, for each specific post are available in the official notification PDF released by Nagaland University.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the official website of Nagaland University.
